creator: mark@foster.cc
text:
Ralf van der Enden wrote:
> Maybe this is a silly question, but the version in ports supersedes
> the one from the security report.
>  
> So do I need to do anything now ?
>  
> Best,
> Ralf
Since the teamspeak_server port is already new enough, it does not
require an update.
However the vuxml entry should still be added, for the
benefit/enlightenment of those users who happen to be running an older
version of the port.
